artifact_summary: Sample report page from DreamReport software displaying October 2014 Northside Pumpage data with a line graph.
artifact_blurb: A screenshot illustrating the DreamReport software's analytical capabilities, featuring a formatted 'Northside Pumpage Report' for October 2014. The visual output combines a structured data table with an interactive line graph visualizing daily pumpage trends across two specific monitoring stations, serving as a demonstration artifact within a broader software evaluation document.
